title: Exploration of the Role of M2 Macrophages in Hepatocellular Carcinoma: Insights into Disulfidptosis and Cellular Interactions.
snippet: The interplay between regulated cell death processes, especially disulfidptosis, and the immune microenvironment in hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) remains poorly understood. Therefore, this study aimed to elucidate these relationships systematically at single-cell resolution. Multi-omics data from TCGA (n = 315) were integrated with single-cell RNA sequenci...
